## Why It Works

This template is straight and to the point, focusing on the thing that keeps most people from being successful. It emphasizes quick movement and hits on the importance of agility in business decisions. Warning against waiting for instructions appeals to self-starters and resonates with entrepreneurial audiences.

## Template

My best piece of [Topic] advice:
[Simple Step 1], [Simple Step 2], [Simple Step 3], and [Simple Step 4].
Waiting around for someone to tell you what to do is the biggest waste of your precious time.

## Example

My best piece of productivity advice:
Take action on your tasks, observe your progress, adjust your approach swiftly, and take action again.
Waiting around for perfect conditions or more information is the biggest waste of your precious time.
